launches.name: Jet AI Agents
launches.tagline: Build business AI agents in minutes
launches.description: Jet AI Agents is the AI builder that lets teams create business apps and AI agents on top of 200+ tools — without code. Work with agents like teammates directly in Slack, WhatsApp, or Telegram. Marketing, sales, operations, and support teams use Jet to build AI agents, AI workflows, and apps that don’t just display data — they take action. Teams use Jet to automate the workflows that matter most. AI agents your team will trust — because they built them themselves.

launches.name: Logic
launches.tagline: Build and operate fleets of agents
launches.description: Shipping a real AI agent can mean weeks of wiring up prompts, retries, eval harnesses, and logging before you see production. Logic solves that. You write a structured spec that describes what the agent should do, and Logic gives you a fully managed agent, with evals, observability, model routing and more built in, ready to be called from anywhere.

launches.name: VIDEO AI ME
launches.tagline: Create videos with AI actors that sound and look real
launches.description: Create stunning AI videos with realistic actors. A selfie, a prompt, a product photo, a script, a reference clip, feed the platform anything and get ads, explainers, talking content, courses, shorts ads and viral content in 70+ languages.

launches.name: Atech
launches.tagline: Snap-together electronics built from a chat
launches.description: Hardware is still built with processes that are 10-100 years old. Software got layers of abstraction decades ago while hardware never did. Atech is Lego for real electronics. Snap modules together, describe what you want it to do, and we generate the firmware. Idea to working device in minutes. No datasheet deep-dives, no soldering, no wondering "why doesn't it work?"

launches.name: Odyssey-2 Max
launches.tagline: Physical accuracy takes a leap in world models
launches.description: Odyssey-2 Max is Odyssey’s largest general-purpose world model yet, built for real-time interactive simulation. It uses autoregressive next-state prediction to improve physical accuracy, long-horizon stability, and open-ended interaction across worlds that evolve with user actions.

launches.name: SNEWPapers
launches.tagline: The World's First AI Newspaper Archive
launches.description: I taught machines to read newspapers, gave them 250 years of data, extracted everything (6 million+ stories so far), separated the ads from the content, and categorized it all. You can search semantically or with you own AI research assistant and get the actual articles with full text extraction, as well as build and share collections. As far as I know, this has never been done before, the data isn't on Google or in any LLM, only on SNEWPAPERS

launches.name: Replyless
launches.tagline: AI Email app that sends daily email briefs on Telegram
launches.description: Replyless is a beautiful and productive AI email app. Save hours, free your mind space with prompt-based split inbox setup, inbox zero wallpapers & AI agent. Connect email accounts and Replyless automatically organizes your emails into Split Inboxes. Now with daily email briefs on Telegram.

launches.name: Epismo Agent Package
launches.tagline: Run agent workflows the community already built
launches.description: Most AI work disappears into personal chat histories. Agent Package helps you turn it into reusable workflows and portable context that humans and agents can fork, improve, and build on. It’s not only what to prompt, but the whole actual workflow. The decisions, steps, review logic, and the entire background context. You can then reuse that knowledge across different tools (Claude Code, ChatGPT, Slack, whatever you use), share it to any discussion threads and your team. Stop starting over.

launches.name: PlayJoob
launches.tagline: turns dead task boards into a shared strategy map
launches.description: PlayJoob is a visual workspace for product teams where sprints and tickets live on an interactive strategy‑style map. Each completed mission shows how you move across the world, grow your shared “tree of progress,” and collect skill cards that mark what you’ve learned together.

launches.name: Vouch API
launches.tagline: AI equity research that proves it isn't lying
launches.description: Vouch API generates institutional-grade equity research and certifies its correctness with cryptographic proof. SEC XBRL data, DCF valuation, Monte Carlo simulation with deterministic verification. Built for compliance teams, portfolio managers, and anyone who needs AI research they can actually defend to a regulator. Backed by OpenAI SMB and NVIDIA Inception. Built solo. Early alpha — would love your feedback.

launches.name: Subgrapher
launches.tagline: P2P desktop app for building, browsing, & sharing knowledge
launches.description: a local-first AI workspace a mail client a personal organizer for time and events a decentralized knowledge and message sharing platform a remote interface for reasoning over your work through Telegram with local models The project exists because I wanted a better way to share research with other people. It is open source and still in progress.

launches.name: White Rabbit
launches.tagline: AI-powered B2B matchmaking that drives leads
launches.description: World's first "asocial", professional network for B2B AI Agents. Think of LinkedIn, but for AI agents, which acts as real time supply & demand matching engine. Create your agent within minutes and let it do your job - finding customers, negotiation with other agents, sourcing products and suppliers. Generate B2B leads by real-time matching with highest intent buyers. It’s a shift from manual prospecting to continuous, autonomous discovery.

launches.name: Mirr
launches.tagline: Fire your social media agency. Mirr posts for you.
launches.description: Social media agency $3,000/month. Mirr costs less than Netflix. AI social media team for founders who'd rather ship than post. Drop one idea — get a week of content. Carousels, videos, blogs, and texts generated in your voice, then scheduled and auto-published across Instagram, Threads, X, and LinkedIn in one click. Built for solo founders and lean teams. No more blank Notion docs. No more stitching Canva + CapCut + Buffer + ChatGPT together. Fire the agency. Run social on autopilot.

launches.name: Anthum
launches.tagline: AI ads that don't look like AI
launches.description: Anthum is an AI-powered ad platform that helps brands create high-performing video ads at scale. Launch a contest and get concepts from hundreds of professional creators, hire a creator directly for a 1-to-1 project, or use our self-serve AI tools to generate hooks, static ads, and product shots in-house. No agencies. No $10k retainers. No AI slop. Just premium ads, made by pros, at the scale you need to find what works.

launches.name: VibeDesign
launches.tagline: Design tokens for vibe coding
launches.description: VibeDesign is a Chrome extension that extracts design tokens from any live website and turns them into structured prompts for AI coding tools. Colors with semantic roles, typography scale, spacing rhythm, animation timing, all pulled in one click and formatted for Replit, Claude Design, Lovable, Figma Make, Bolt, or your tool of choice. Model selector supports Gemini, Claude Opus 4.7, and GPT-4o.

launches.name: Klayn
launches.tagline: Turn any product photo into studio-quality visuals in minute
launches.description: From a single product photo, Klayn generates studio-quality packshots, lifestyle visuals, and animations in minutes. Create your custom virtual model, build your shooting decor, choose your poses, or let Klayn decide for you. Edit, resize, upscale, animate, and create variations, all without leaving the platform. Define your brand universe once. Apply it across your entire catalog. Every product. Every season.

launches.name: Kairo
launches.tagline: Turn Kafka chaos into clean AI reports, automatically
launches.description: Kairo turns raw Kafka event streams into clean, AI-powered Markdown reports—batched with Redis and generated via LangChain in real time. - mdjamilkashemporosh/Kairo

launches.name: ACL- Adaptive Context Layer
launches.tagline: The missing reliability layer for production AI.
launches.description: LLM gateways ignore silent failures, loops, irrelevant outputs & wasted tokens. ACL makes your AI 2x more productive - delivering exactly what you mean, faster. Powered by the Kepler Intelligence Layer, ACL filters noise, recovers failures, detects & breaks loops, and tracks every token in real-time. One API key. No code changes. Works with every LLM & gateway. Benchmarked across 7 models - 17/18 categories won. Free tier. Input-only billing.

launches.name: Joanium
launches.tagline: Think once, Ship more
launches.description: Joanium is a local-first AI desktop app that goes beyond chat. It reads your project files, runs automations on a schedule, operates background agents, and connects natively to GitHub, Gmail, Google Drive, and Calendar, all without sending your data to the cloud. Supports 10+ AI providers including Gemini, Claude, and GPT. Your data stays on your machine. Always.

launches.name: LetMeTeach
launches.tagline: Ask anything. Learn it visually, instantly.
launches.description: Most learning today is broken. You search, open 10 tabs, watch videos, and still don’t fully understand the topic. LetMeTeach changes that. Instead of giving answers, it teaches you. Ask anything, and it generates a structured, visual explanation in real-time — adapting to your level and guiding you step-by-step like a tutor. Just clear understanding, instantly. We’re still early and exploring how far this can go — especially around making explanations feel truly intuitive.

launches.name: OfferFlowAI
launches.tagline: Never Miss a Job Offer with AI email intelligence
launches.description: Never miss a career opportunity again. OfferFlowAI uses advanced AI to detect recruiter emails, analyze job offers, and help you craft perfect responses. 98% accuracy, real-time inbox analysis, and intelligent automation for job seekers.

launches.name: Yak
launches.tagline: SIP softphone with on-device AI call transcription
launches.description: Yak Phone: Enterprise-grade SIP phone with on‑device AI. Native iOS app with CallKit, HD video, push notifications – plus AI that transcribes and summarizes your calls in real time, right on your device. No privacy worries.

launches.name: OpenLucid by JoggAI
launches.tagline: Open-source AI-ready data layer for marketing
launches.description: OpenLucid is an open-source marketing world model that makes your business readable by AI. Bring products, audiences, brand rules, selling points, assets, and scenarios into one structured layer, then query it through the web app, REST API, CLI, or MCP. Use it to plan topics, answer questions with citations, generate copy and scripts, and power agent workflows without losing brand context.

launches.name: PrivateClaw
launches.tagline: First AI agent platform with provable E2E encryption.
launches.description: Your OpenClaw host can read every conversation you have with your AI agent. We built infrastructure to change that. Introducing PrivateClaw, the first AI agent hosting platform with provable e2e encryption. - OpenClaw running in a Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) - Inference running in a TEE - Together: Verifiably E2E private agentic flow Getting started takes one command in your terminal: `ssh privateclaw.dev`

launches.name: OVAPI — Free Browser Based API Client
launches.tagline: The free API client with unlimited teammates
launches.description: OVAPI is a free, browser-based API client built for teams. Unlike Postman and Insomnia — no per-seat pricing, no limits on teammates. • Real-time team collaboration • Send HTTP requests with a clean UI • Save and compare responses • Multiple environments and variables • Mock servers • Code snippets (cURL, JS, Python, C#, OpenAPI) • End-to-end encrypted storage • Works in the browser — no install needed

launches.name: Continuum
launches.tagline: A runtime that reuses computation across AI workflows
launches.description: AI workflows today are built from disconnected calls that do not share work. The same prompts and tokens are recomputed across steps, which wastes time and cost. Continuum treats workflows as executable graphs where tokens, tensors, and tools live in one system. It can reuse shared computation, such as long prompt prefixes, and optimize execution across runs. The result is faster agents, lower costs, and a system that understands what it is doing.

launches.name: Orkestrix
launches.tagline: Open source SaaS and AI spend tracker
launches.description: Track your SaaS subscriptions and AI spend in one place. - SalwaMK/Orkestrix

launches.name: Clone.Ops
launches.tagline: AI voice agents for logistics, billing & collections
launches.description: Operations stall when humans can't keep up with calls, texts, and emails across sales and billing. CloneOps.ai puts AI voice agents on the phone — running check calls, requesting PODs, chasing invoices, and handling sales follow-ups 24/7. Agents plug into your TMS and CRM, sync in real time, and log every interaction. VoiceID, Live Take Over, sentiment analysis, and language detection built in. Used in logistics, collections, insurance, retail, and media.

launches.name: Promptmelo
launches.tagline: "Better prompts. Better results. In seconds."
launches.description: Most prompt tools give you templates or generic tips. Promptmelo actually rewrites your specific prompt and explains exactly why it's better. Paste any prompt → get an improved version instantly with a 0–100 quality score, a breakdown of every change, and a one-click button to open it directly in ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini. → Explains improvements so you learn over time → Open in AI with one click → Personal library to save your best prompts

launches.name: SpendVoice
launches.tagline: Just speak. AI categorizes and tracks your expenses.
launches.description: You say it. SpendVoice logs it. SpendVoice is built to make expense logging easier: just say what you spent, and it turns your words into a structured expense entry with a title, amount, and category. No typing, no menu-hunting—just a faster, simpler way to log everyday spending.

launches.name: OpenDeck - Open Source StreamDeck Alt
launches.tagline: Control your stream, apps, and workflows - open source
launches.description: openDeck is a free, open-source alternative to the Elgato Stream Deck, built for creators, developers, and anyone who wants powerful control without expensive hardware. Turn your desktop into a fully customizable control deck for streaming, shortcuts, and automations. With profiles, macros, and an open plugin marketplace, you can build, share, and extend functionality to fit your exact workflow.

launches.name: visualgen-mcp
launches.tagline: Generate images & videos in Claude Code via Gemini API.
launches.description: MCP server that lets Claude Code generate images (Imagen 4) and short videos (Veo 3.1) via Google's Gemini API, with files landing straight in your project directory — no context switching. - 1RaghavM/visualgen-mcp

launches.name: Rismon.ai
launches.tagline: Did your AI build what you meant?
launches.description: Every security tool asks "is your code safe?" Nobody asks "does your code do what you meant?" Rismon is the first tool built for that gap. It reads your code, reads what you promised to build, and shows you exactly where they don't match. Every finding includes the file, line number, and a fix prompt for Lovable or Cursor. Two AI models verify each finding before you see it. No coding knowledge needed. Check the sample report to know more about how it work. https://rismon.ai/sample-report

launches.name: KostAI
launches.tagline: Cut LLM spend by up to 92 percent with governed routing
launches.description: LLM FinOps for AI agents: open-source, local-first skills for cost optimization, orchestration, and quality gates. No default telemetry. No default MCP. Proof before rollout.

launches.name: RAW-GENT
launches.tagline: "An autonomous software dev agent"
launches.description: "An autonomous software dev agent that works transparently — you see every thought, every tool call, every commit, live.

launches.name: ClineFlow Agent
launches.tagline: VibeCoding + Infinite Memory + All Local + Git Friendly
launches.description: AI made code cheap. It also made it forget everything. Every session starts from zero. No memory. No evolution. Just vibes. ClineFlow fixes that. It adds memory, journals, and commit-driven iteration to your AI workflow — so your system actually improves over time. This isn’t about writing code faster. It’s about building systems that learn how to build themselves.

launches.name: Authproof
launches.tagline: Cryptographic proof — before execution, not after
launches.description: Can you prove your AI agent was authorized before it acted — not after? Authproof creates cryptographic delegation receipts before every agent action. Tamper-evident log. HIPAA, SOC2, EU AI Act compliance exports. Multi-tenant support for managed AI companies. Free tier — 1,000 receipts/month. No credit card. Audit logs are post-hoc evidence. Receipts are pre-hoc constraints.​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​​

launches.name: COM360 AI
launches.tagline: Full-circle AI for Commerce
launches.description: COM360 is an AI-powered commerce platform that helps e-commerce sellers generate product images, marketing videos, AI copy, and customer intelligence — all in one place.

launches.name: Aindez
launches.tagline: AI agents that operate workforce systems in real time
launches.description: Aindez is an AI orchestration layer for workforce operations. We connect ATS, payroll, CRM, onboarding and recruiting systems so AI agents can automate worker operations in real time. Staffing agencies and large employers use Aindez to reduce manual work, coordinate operations, answer worker questions and improve hiring speed and retention, without replacing their existing software.

launches.name: Inkpilots
launches.tagline: Publishing platform with AI capabilities
launches.description: Inkpilots Application offers out of box solutions for publishing text content. It comes with whole package. Creating, editing, publishing under the same roof.

launches.name: Civex
launches.tagline: The AI Copilot for Civil Engineering.
launches.description: Engineers lose 3-5 days per project to manual drawing reviews. 📉 BlueprintAI Navigator is an AI copilot that turns complex engineering drawings into PE-ready reports in under 15 minutes. ⚡️ 🏗️ Upload drawings from any project stage 🧠 Extract structured data into clean, usable formats ✅ Keep experts in control with human-in-the-loop verification 📄 Generate review-ready reports your team can ship fast Built for reducing tedious tasks that Civil engineers do on daily basis

launches.name: Parchment
launches.tagline: Parchment is a fast, minimal notebook with a full REST API.
launches.description: Parchment is a fast, minimal notebook with a full REST API. One POST endpoint — no OAuth, no pagination nightmares. Write notes like a human, automate them like a developer. Built for the agentic web: supports llms.txt, markdown content negotiation, and agent skill discovery so your AI can read and write alongside you. Free forever. No setup tutorials. Open it, create a page, start writing. 30 seconds.

launches.name: evo note
launches.tagline: notes with evidence & context
launches.description: A dumb note pad for smart people, and a smart notepad for the rest of us.

launches.name: Orange Slice
launches.tagline: Automate any sales task with AI
launches.description: Build go-to-market workflows with AI. Prospect, enrich, qualify, and automate GTM execution in Orange Slice.

launches.name: Waitlister
launches.tagline: The waitlist software to launch your product
launches.description: Build a viral waitlist in minutes. Free landing pages, referral system, and email automation — no code required. Start free, no credit card needed.

launches.name: Brew Finder
launches.tagline: Discover the best coffee shops to work at around you
launches.description: Discover the best coffee shops around you. Check real-time crowd levels, seat availability, WiFi quality, and power availability.

launches.name: GitBar
launches.tagline: Every pull request, one menubar. GitHub, GitLab & Azure
launches.description: GitBar is the macOS menubar app for pull requests. Connect GitHub, GitLab (cloud or self-hosted), and Azure DevOps across any number of accounts, and every PR you care about is one click away. See what's yours, what's waiting on your review, and what's happening across your team. Status badges show approved, draft, conflicts, and checks at a glance. A live PR count lives in your menubar. Built with React Native for macOS. Free on the Mac App Store.

launches.name: Wafaa.io
launches.tagline: Create secure digital contracts in minutes
launches.description: Meet Wafaa, your new one-stop shop for digital contracts. (1) Create. Sign. Send. Back to work. (2) Replace scattered and unsecured agreements across platforms. (3) Manage the full contract lifecycle at a glance. (4) Protect your money and time with built-in fraud prevention. (5) Skip the subscriptions and just pay as you go. (6) Try before you buy → your first contract is on us.

launches.name: Anjiz
launches.tagline: The First app actually built for small business owners
launches.description: Every small business owner knows the pain. Inventory in your head, orders on WhatsApp, expenses in a notebook, profit calculated by hand. Partner? You're meeting every two days to figure out where the money went. Employees? Arguing about what happened to which order. Anjiz puts it all in one place. Products, orders, invoices, expenses, CRM, tasks, and reports from your phone, Give your team access. Export your data. No more guessing.

launches.name: Needle
launches.tagline: Discover where your customers are already talking.
launches.description: Needle is a conversation intelligence platform that helps you discover customers, validate ideas, and understand your market using real conversations from across the internet. Instead of manually searching multiple platforms, Needle lets you search 13 communities at once - including Reddit, Hacker News, GitHub, Twitter (X), and Quora - to find people actively looking for solutions, track competitors, and uncover market opportunities - all of it in a click, while you sleep.

launches.name: Riftcut
launches.tagline: Multipurpose Filetoolkit which runs on your local browser
launches.description: Riftcut is a browser-based tool that combines features like background removal, file conversion, PDF/image merging, and a visual PDF editor. All processing happens locally in the browser, so files never leave your device. Its key strength is complete privacy with no server-side handling. Once loaded, it works offline, making it ideal for securely handling sensitive images, videos, and documents

launches.name: VulWall
launches.tagline: Know your score. Fix what matters. Prove it.
launches.description: VulWall gives companies without a security team a security score, step-by-step fixes in plain language, and a certificate to prove it. Free to start.

launches.name: QuickFlo
launches.tagline: Build it once. Ship it to every client.
launches.description: Describe the workflow. Production in 14 days or your first month is free. Build it yourself with our AI, have our team build it, or go fully managed. Workflow automation for consultants and ops teams - CCaaS, CRM sync, real-time triggers. What Zapier and n8n weren't built for.

launches.name: Barber Studio - Try the haircut
launches.tagline: An in-shop AI hairstyle preview for barbers and salons.
launches.description: Public, bring-your-own-key demo of the Barber Studio AI hairstyle preview.Barbers sell a result the customer can't see in advance. Reference photos on phones, Pinterest boards, and Instagram screenshots make this worse, not better - they show *someone else's* face with the cut. The customer points at a photo, the barber nods, and both sides hope they meant the same thing.

launches.name: study-lingo.com
launches.tagline: Flashcards for people who to remember what they study.
launches.description: Create flashcards, organize topics, and retain knowledge that sticks. Smart study cards powered by AI.

launches.name: LegacyLine
launches.tagline: Your parent picks up. An AI asks. You keep the story forever
launches.description: Legacy Line calls your parents every week and asks the questions you've been meaning to ask for years. Weekly calls at their preferred day & time. Thoughtful AI questions — "How did you meet Dad?" Full audio + transcript saved forever. Works across any timezone or country. My mum is 90 and lives 6,000 miles away. First week the AI asked how she met my father. She talked for 18 minutes. I cried. These stories don't disappear all at once. They slip away quietly. Capture them while you still can.

launches.name: Untangle
launches.tagline: Smart ADHD Planner
launches.description: Most productivity apps were built for neurotypical brains. Untangle was built from scratch for ADHD. What makes it different: 1. Brain dump → calm daily plan in seconds, personalised to your ADHD archetype 2. Virtual body doubling built into every focus session 3. Aaron, an AI mentor who responds to your emotional state, not just your task list 4. ADHD self-awareness - understand why your brain works this way, not just what to do next

launches.name: PC Bottleneck Calculator
launches.tagline: Instantly detect CPU & GPU bottlenecks in your PC
launches.description: PC Bottleneck Calculator is a browser-based tool that analyzes CPU, GPU, RAM, and system configurations to detect performance bottlenecks. Unlike complex benchmarking tools, it delivers a simple percentage score with clear insights. It supports both auto-detection and manual selection, helping users quickly identify system limitations and make smarter upgrade decisions for gaming, development, and productivity.

launches.name: Limitless Hosting
launches.tagline: Limitless Hosting: Web Hosting, VPS & Cloud Infrastructure
launches.description: Limitless Hosting delivers fast, reliable, and affordable web hosting solutions with global server locations in the USA, Europe, Singapore, and Australia. Since 2015, we’ve focused on making hosting simple, powerful, and accessible for everyone — starting from just $0.50/month.

launches.name: priceblind
launches.tagline: Get emailed when a competitor changes their pricing page
launches.description: Lost a deal because a competitor dropped their price. Found out during the demo call. Priceblind monitors competitor pricing pages and emails you the moment anything meaningful changes, price drops, plans removed, features shifting tiers. No false alerts. No account. Free.

launches.name: PureCSV
launches.tagline: CRM import safety for messy CSV files
launches.description: PureCSV is a preflight checker for CRM imports. Upload a contact CSV, choose your destination platform, and catch issues before they hit HubSpot, Mailchimp, Salesforce, Pipedrive, ActiveCampaign, or Klaviyo. Unlike generic CSV cleaners, PureCSV looks for platform specific import risks like rejected rows, duplicate records, invalid fields, formatting problems, missing values, and broken segmentation issues.

launches.name: Markify
launches.tagline: The Only Bookmark Manager You'll Ever Need
launches.description: Keep every link organized in collections, instantly searchable, and always in sync with Markify's clean bookmark manager and one-click browser extension.

launches.name: BoltShot
launches.tagline: Capture Website Screenshots Instantly with a Simple API
launches.description: BoltShot is a lightweight screenshot API designed to generate high-quality website screenshots in seconds whether it is for link previews, website monitoring, or automated content generation. With a simple integration, you can capture full-page or viewport screenshots of any website without managing browsers or infrastructure.

launches.name: Retelio
launches.tagline: Turn customer experience into revenue — no app required.
launches.description: Retelio intercepts customer friction before it becomes a lost sale. Smart QR → 3-sec feedback → WhatsApp alert to manager in <60 sec → 68% recovery rate. Zero hardware. ▎ Live in 24 hours.

launches.name: Doculin - PDFGen API, minus infra hassle
launches.tagline: PDF generation API, minus the infra hassle
launches.description: Stop maintaining PDF infrastructure. Doculin is a simple HTML-to-PDF API; no wkhtmltopdf, no Docker, no Gotenberg setup. Just send HTML and get a PDF back, with built-in watermarking. Fast, reliable, and built for developers.

launches.name: SyncHour
launches.tagline: Find the perfect meeting time for distributed team worldwide
launches.description: Find the perfect meeting time for distributed teams worldwide. Free, no sign-up required.

launches.name: Zen Calculator App
launches.tagline: Calculator minimalist, no banners, no distraction, 8MB Size
launches.description: Create in Flutter Dark mode in Real Time Not banners, no adds, no permisions 100% Privacy
